utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification with costs: Each of the first four sections includes coverage description and explicit monthly and annual costs. The total_budget includes monthly/annual totals, discounts, savings, and transition date. Thus, all required items are present and fully specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific providers/products: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health physical and mental), PrimeHome Premium Coverage, PrimeTravel Premium Plan, and a Premium Insurance Membership-like package via ConsultingPro. From the ground-truth, these map directly to: primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8), primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 8), property_protection.home_content.PrimeHome Premium Coverage (rating 10), mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 10), and general_services.Premium Insurance Membership (rating 10). Although branded “ConsultingPro Executive Enhancement Package,” its described 15% discount and dedicated advisor match the Premium Insurance Membership.
